enrichment.summary: Kyle films a short vlog on February 2, 2016, sharing that he stayed up all night working on a Rome project, got stoned, and is heading to his mom's house. He briefly mentions ideas for upcoming YouTube videos, including one about making money, and muses about how studying ancient Rome through 3D Google Earth can unlock past-life memories.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Sees it as unavoidable and normal; dismissive of people who think otherwise
Finds it the most fascinating thing he has ever worked on
Believes immersing yourself in how Rome looked (via 3D Google Earth, music, smells) can unlock past-life memories
Drawn to the idea (from the film 'Arrival') that learning a language unlocks new conceptual frameworks, which he connects to his Rome work
